chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-112 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 03.08.2022 Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Additional Advocate General Sindh a/w Abdul Rasheed Abro, District Accounts Officer, Jacobabad and Sikandar Hussain, Deputy Director Legal, Finance Department, Karachi. ------ Learned Additional Advocate General files compliance report on behalf of the Secretary to the Government of Sindh, Finance Department alongwith certain documents, which is taken on record. He submits the order passed by this court has been complied with and the pensionary benefits have been released to the petitioner. In view of the statement of the learned Additional Advocate General, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that if this is the position, instant petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge
